descriptionTemplate: Murphy gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Gain 1 Tentacle. After Murphy plays a card, gain 1 Temporary Tentacle that ignores the Tentacle Limit and Keyflare Regen equal to 1 Arithmetica Cost, up to 3 times per turn.

patch.descriptionTemplate: Murphy gains [Energy:Arg1] Aliemus. {Rouse}: Gain 1 Tentacle. After Murphy plays a card, gain 1 Temporary Tentacle ignoring the Tentacle Limit, plus Keyflare Regen equal to 1 Arithmetica Cost, up to 3 times per turn.The first {Vortex Reversed} and {Divine Maiden's Birth} played each turn have their DMG count and Arithmetica gain doubled respectively.
